settings_mode_description: Switch between dry-run (plans only, nothing is deleted) and live (deletions are actually executed).
settings_mode_toggle_hint: When off, runs only produce plans. When on, an armed run can delete media and torrents.
settings_mode_confirm_body: Runs will actually delete media and torrents — no longer dry-run. Per-instance act flags and the HnR veto still apply. You can switch back to dry-run at any time.
settings_debug_description_intro: Editable sections as the daemon sees them (YAML + UI overrides merged).
settings_debug_description_with_override: Lines with an amber border diverge from the YAML baseline — hover them to see the original value.
settings_debug_description_no_overrides: No active overrides — all values come from the YAML config file.
settings_arr_description: Click a tile to configure. Connections live in the database (the source of truth) — the YAML arrs: block only seeds them on first boot. Edits here reload the daemon automatically.
settings_field_public_url_hint: optional, used for clickable links in this UI
settings_arr_act_warning: Act is on — Triagearr may delete media from this instance during live runs.
settings_arr_test_hint: Pings the instance with the current credentials without saving.
settings_validate_url_required: URL is required when the connection is enabled.
settings_validate_api_key_required: API key is required when the connection is enabled.
settings_validate_timeout_positive: Timeout must be zero or positive.
settings_validate_public_url_absolute: Public URL must be an absolute http(s) URL.
settings_torrent_test_hint: Pings the client with the current credentials without saving.
settings_torrent_description: Click a tile to configure. Connections live in the database (the source of truth) — the YAML torrent_clients: block only seeds them on first boot. Edits here reload the daemon automatically. Only qBittorrent has a backend today; the other tiles are placeholders for upcoming clients.
settings_disk_description: Thresholds that drive the auto-deletion trigger. Threshold is when a run fires; target is how much free space the run aims to restore.
settings_disk_threshold_desc: Run fires when free space drops below this
settings_disk_target_desc: Free space the run aims to restore
settings_disk_tip_threshold_free_percent: Percentage of free space below which a deletion run is triggered. Example: 10 means a run starts when less than 10 % of the volume is free.
settings_disk_tip_target_free_percent: Free space percentage the deletion run aims to restore. The run stops once this level is reached. Must be higher than the threshold.
settings_notif_test_success: Test sent — check your Telegram chat.
settings_notif_enable_telegram_hint: Fires on disk-pressure deletes only — not on manual runs.
settings_notif_test_desc: Sends a synthetic message through the saved config.
settings_notif_description: Click a tile to configure. Notifications fire only on disk-pressure deletes — manual runs stay silent. Credentials are stored as runtime overrides.
settings_polling_description: How often each poller runs. Accepts Go durations like 30s, 5m, 1h.
settings_polling_tip_torrent_client_inte: How often to poll the torrent client for the current torrent list and stats.
settings_polling_tip_arr_interval: How often to poll the *arr apps for media ↔ download mappings.
settings_polling_tip_arr_file_min_interv: Minimum gap between per-file *arr lookups, to avoid hammering the *arr APIs.
settings_polling_tip_tracker_interval: How often to refresh each torrent's tracker status (alive/dead).
settings_polling_tip_disk_interval: How often to sample free disk space to evaluate disk pressure.
settings_scoring_description: Tunes the DeleteScore algorithm. The HnR-window veto (-10000) is hard-coded and not editable here.
settings_scoring_tip_hnr_window_days: Days a freshly-completed private torrent is shielded from deletion to satisfy hit-and-run rules.
settings_scoring_tip_hnr_window_veto: Hard veto (-10000): the torrent is still inside its hit-and-run window and is shielded from deletion until the window elapses. Non-configurable.
settings_scoring_tip_ratio_obligation_me: Bonus once a private torrent has met its required ratio and seed time — safe to remove.
settings_scoring_tip_upload_velocity_inv: Bonus for torrents barely uploading anymore; actively-seeding torrents score lower.
settings_scoring_tip_age_days: Tiny daily bonus so older torrents rank slightly higher. A tiebreaker, not a main signal.
settings_scoring_tip_seeders_low_guard: Heavy penalty that protects rare torrents with very few seeders.
settings_scoring_tip_swarm_health_bonus: Bonus for healthy, well-seeded torrents — losing one copy is low-risk.
settings_scoring_tip_tracker_dead_bonus: Bonus when every tracker is dead — the content is likely unrecoverable elsewhere, so reap it.
settings_scoring_tip_candidate_boost: User override (+2000): you flagged this torrent for deletion. Overrides every guard except the hit-and-run window veto.
settings_scoring_sim_description: Example torrents scored against your current edits — including unsaved ones. Move a weight or threshold and watch the ranking and factor breakdown react.
settings_scoring_archdesc_public_well_se: Public tracker, fully seeded, old. Ratio & HnR are inert on public — high score, safe to reap.
settings_scoring_archdesc_private_obliga: Private, ratio & seed-time met, past the HnR window — reapable.
settings_scoring_archdesc_private_in_hnr: Private, completed recently — inside the HnR window. Hard veto, never deleted.
settings_scoring_archdesc_private_obliga: Private, ratio below min_ratio and too young — obligation not met.
settings_scoring_archdesc_rare_content: Private, obligation met, but ~1 seeder on a live tracker — rare-content guard protects it.
settings_scoring_archdesc_dead_tracker_l: Private, every tracker dead past the grace window — primary graveyard target.
settings_tracker_tip_min_ratio: Minimum share ratio a private torrent must reach before its obligation counts as met.
settings_tracker_tip_min_seed_days: Minimum days a private torrent must seed before its obligation counts as met.
settings_tracker_tip_rare_threshold: At or below this seeder count a torrent is treated as rare and protected from deletion.
settings_tracker_tip_enabled: Turn this tracker's override on or off without deleting its values.
settings_tracker_defaults_applied: Applied to every tracker without an explicit override.
settings_tracker_none_observed: No trackers observed yet. Configure qBittorrent and wait for the tracker poller to run.
settings_tracker_panel_description: Per-tracker overrides for Factor 1 (ratio obligation) and Factor 4 (rare-content guard). Trackers without an override inherit the conservative defaults. When all trackers attached to a torrent are dead, Factor 1 degrades silently — no policy enforcement against a counterparty that no longer exists.
dash_top_reap_sub: highest score · would be deleted first in a live run
actions_warning_suffix: files from disk and unmonitor matching items in connected *arrs.
actions_none_recorded: No actions recorded for this run.
actions_no_runs_trigger: No runs yet. Trigger one above.
actions_select_run_hint: Select a run on the left to see its candidates and actions.
actions_no_live_deletions: No live deletions yet — only live runs record actions.
as_desc_failed_qbit: The *arr deletes succeeded but qBittorrent refused the torrent delete. The media files were removed; the torrent may still be in qBit.
as_desc_aborted_arr_fail: A delete call to an *arr instance failed, so the run stopped before touching qBittorrent. Files already deleted in *arr are not restored — *arr will re-monitor and may re-grab.
as_desc_aborted_nlink_check: The hardlink safety probe hit a filesystem error (permissions, I/O, or a missing save path) before it could decide. *arr deletes already ran; the qBit delete was not attempted.
as_desc_skipped_cross_seed: A file is still hardlinked by another torrent (cross-seed). Deleting it in qBittorrent would free no space and break the other torrent, so it was skipped. *arr deletes are not rolled back.
ao_desc_skipped: This step was deliberately skipped (e.g. a cross-seed peer still holds the files).
ao_desc_not_attempted: This step was never reached because an earlier step in the pipeline failed.
settings_field_error_empty: empty value (use the revert button to remove the override)
comp_score_no_breakdown: No factor breakdown was persisted for this torrent.
comp_drawer_orphan: Orphan — no *arr instance imported this torrent.
comp_drawer_unprotect_title: Remove the protection: this torrent becomes a normal cleanup candidate again.
comp_drawer_protect_title: Protect this torrent from cleanup. Reversible at any time.
comp_drawer_prioritize_title: Prioritize this torrent for deletion: a large boost pushes it to the top of the reap queue. Overrides every guard except the hit-and-run window. Clears Protect.
comp_drawer_unprioritize_title: Remove the deletion priority: this torrent becomes a normal cleanup candidate again.
comp_login_daemon_running: {error} — is the daemon running on this host?
comp_login_auth_enabled_notice: Authentication is enabled on this Triagearr instance.
comp_run_live_description: Live mode deletes media via *arr and removes torrents from qBit. Type "{phrase}" to confirm.
comp_run_dryrun_description: Dry-run computes candidates and persists the plan without deleting anything.
comp_security_enable_intro_prefix: Enable a username + password gate. The password can be auto-generated (leave blank); it's shown
comp_security_enable_intro_suffix: here and never stored in plain text.
comp_security_password_not_shown_again: It won't be shown again. You're already signed in for this session.
comp_security_disable_warning: Removes the user and forgets the session. The dashboard becomes open — only do this if upstream protection (TinyAuth/Authelia/private LAN) is in place.
